Published Applications.label: Launcher Ops
Published Applications.description: Manage and Benchmark your favorite launchers in Android. Detect anomalies, permission usages and clones that could potentially ruin your android homescreen experience.

Published Applications.label: Launchers Quick Tile
Published Applications.description: Swap launcher homescreens from your statusbar quicktile section. Supports up to Android 12.

Published Applications.label: Launchers on-Tap
Published Applications.description: Swap launcher apps from a quick tile or an advanced homescreen widget. Android 13+ required.

Published Applications.label: Truesight
Published Applications.description: Truesight is a steam companion app built for Android that provides gamers with trending information from steam such as live steam service status, online count, game peak player counts, data matrixs, trending game information,news.

Published Applications.label: Carpentar
Published Applications.description: An Icon Pack and Icon Resource Manager.

Libraries.label: Google Play Publisher API
Libraries.description: Java library for android that builds off of a rest api by Rajkumar. Pulls publisher info for a selected app off of Google Play.

Libraries.label: Expandable Preference Group
Libraries.description: A custom preference group for android that expands on click to show preferences held inside the group and can condense them for a cleaner UI.

Libraries.label: SpareChange
Libraries.description: Another Google Play In-App Billing library for android created by GocalSD. I was tired of waiting for updates from another library, so I made one myself!

Experimental or Deprecated.label: Sapphire Launcher
Experimental or Deprecated.description: My first custom launcher based on AOSP by Slim Roms. It was launched in 2015 and later unpublished to be upgraded with a pixal launcher clone.

Experimental or Deprecated.label: Sapphyx Launcher
Experimental or Deprecated.description: Launched in 2017, Sapphyx Launcher was my first launched that was based on Google Pixel Launcher port to the public and offered an array of cool new features and customization. This project had taught me that it was becoming really difficult to based projects on another source and we should start look at build from the ground up.

Experimental or Deprecated.label: GCA Launcher
Experimental or Deprecated.description: Gocal's Custom Android Launcher. Launched in late 2018, retired in 2021 for deprecation reasons. Currently in the pipeline to make a full return for android 17.

Experimental or Deprecated.label: Drosera Launcher
Experimental or Deprecated.description: My own take on a custom android launcher designed for handhelds and personal desktop environments. Currently in development.
